TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-intro_Panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: u ngangan aku ci panay.
S.PHON: u ŋaŋan aku ʦi panaj.
S.FORM: u ngangan aku ci panay.
S.PHON: u ŋaŋan aku ʦi panaj.

S.FORM: u hofuc aku itini i ciwkangan.
S.PHON: u ħo~ufuʦ aku itini i ʦiwkaŋan.
S.FORM: u hofuc aku itini i ciwkangan.
S.PHON: u ħo~ufuʦ aku itini i ʦiwkaŋan.

S.FORM: tulu a polo' lima a miheca'an tusa ku safaw nu fulad tusa polo' ira ku falu nu romi'ad tu kahofucan aku.
S.PHON: tuɾu a po~uɾo~uʡ ɾima a miħəʦaʡan tusa ku safaw nu fuɾaɬ~ɮ tusa po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku faɾu nu ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tu kaħo~ufuʦan aku.
S.FORM: tulu a polo' lima a miheca'an tusa ku safaw nu fulad tusa polo' ira ku falu nu romi'ad tu kahofucan aku.
S.PHON: tuɾu a po~uɾo~uʡ ɾima a miħəʦaʡan tusa ku safaw nu fuɾaɬ~ɮ tusa po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku faɾu nu ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ tu kaħo~ufuʦan aku.
S.TRANSL: 我出生在民國三十五年十二月二十八日.

S.FORM: itini i kakacawan ku pitilidan aku enem a miheca'.
S.PHON: itini i kakaʦawan ku pitiɾiɬ~ɮan aku ənəm a miħəʦaʡ.
S.FORM: itini i kakacawan ku pitilidan aku enem a miheca'.
S.PHON: itini i kakaʦawan ku pitiɾiɬ~ɮan aku ənəm a miħəʦaʡ.
S.TRANSL: I went to school here in Kakacawan for six years.

S.FORM: misawad itini i pitilidan.
S.PHON: misawaɬ~ɮ itini i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: misawad itini i pitilidan.
S.PHON: misawaɬ~ɮ itini i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan.

S.FORM: mihakerong tu matuasay malingad minanam tu tayal nu malingaday.
S.PHON: miħakəro~uŋ tu matuasaj maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ minanam tu tajaɾ nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj.
S.FORM: mihakerong tu matuasay malingad minanam tu tayal nu malingaday.
S.PHON: miħakəro~uŋ tu matuasaj maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ minanam tu tajaɾ nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj.
S.TRANSL: 跟隨老人家,學習農務的工作.
I worked with the elders and learned farming.

S.FORM: matuastu cifahinay kaku.
S.PHON: matuastu ʦifaħinaj kaku.
S.FORM: matuastu cifahinay kaku.
S.PHON: matuastu ʦifaħinaj kaku.
S.TRANSL: I grew up and got married.

S.FORM: tatulu ku wawa aku sahtu fafahi'an.
S.PHON: tatuɾu ku wawa aku saħtu fafaħiʡan.
S.FORM: tatulu ku wawa aku sahtu fafahi'an.
S.PHON: tatuɾu ku wawa aku saħtu fafaħiʡan.

TRANSL.notes: I have three children; all (of them) are female.

S.TRANSL: I have three children; all are female.

S.FORM: maemintu mikatafu.
S.PHON: maəmintu mikatafu.
S.FORM: maemintu mikatafu.
S.PHON: maəmintu mikatafu.

S.FORM: lalima ku suna aku.
S.PHON: ɾaɾima ku suna aku.
S.FORM: lalima ku suna aku.
S.PHON: ɾaɾima ku suna aku.

S.FORM: anini ku tayal aku u milisuay tu matuasay.
S.PHON: anini ku tajaɾ aku u miɾisuaj tu matuasaj.
S.FORM: anini ku tayal aku u milisuay tu matuasay.
S.PHON: anini ku tajaɾ aku u miɾisuaj tu matuasaj.
S.TRANSL: 現在,我的工作是照顧老人.
Now, my job is to take care of elders.

S.FORM: jujiakanhu ku tayal aku anini.
S.PHON: jujiakanħu ku tajaɾ aku anini.
S.FORM: jujiakanhu ku tayal aku anini.
S.PHON: jujiakanħu ku tajaɾ aku anini.
S.TRANSL: 居家看護,是我現在的工作.
Home care is my present profession.

S.FORM: hatiraay ku maku a urip tangasa anini.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj ku maku a urip taŋasa anini.
S.FORM: hatiraay ku maku a urip tangasa anini.
S.PHON: ħatiraaj ku maku a urip taŋasa anini.
S.TRANSL: 我的生活就是那樣子,一直到現在.
My life has been like that up to now.
